name: @caia/ai-first-upgrade-scanner
description: Layer 6 of the AI-first continuous discipline framework. Daily cron that WebSearches Anthropic / OpenAI / Cognition / arxiv / Hacker News for new agent-engineering patterns, LLM-filters for CAIA relevance, drafts candidate ADRs, surfaces them to INBOX under '## AI-FIRST-UPGRADE CANDIDATES'. AI-first discipline: LLM judgment is the primary tool; deterministic part is just cadence + curated source list. Subscription-only via @chiefaia/claude-spawner. Adapter-based WebSearcher + RelevanceCritic for testability. launchd plist com.caia.ai-first-upgrade-daily runs 04:00 local.
